race.comment: HE IS THE KISS (10) ended his maiden status at start 49 when he scrambled home two back on the Gold Coast poly. Disappointed under 60kgs on the Sunshine Coast poly subsequently. Has raced seven times on heavy ground for four placings. Drops sharply in the weights and can bounce back. CALVARY (14) shared the lead into the lane but had to settle for second prize again last start over 1550m. Loves heavy tracks and he is rock hard fit so this looks a nice race for him to break an 88-week win drought. BEEARETEE (12) is often in the money but finds it hard to win. Last raced two-and-a-half weeks ago when he finished second over 1518m at Coffs Harbour. Include. ESCAPE BEACH (11) best of the rest.
